sections.description: Bun runtime, HTTP server, MCP transports, and the shared `execute` tool host.
Operator CLI for status checks, configured skill inspection, and Agent Vault probe delegation.
Local Holocron docs gateway for Contract guides and synced OpenAPI reference.
Shared Contract metadata, branded scalar types, and domain schemas used across packages.
Pure MCP contract schemas, diagnostics, and execute-tool metadata.
Runtime services for execute workers, filesystem skill reads, Agent Vault integration, sessions, catalog, and storage.
Effect HttpApi contract for health/docs/OpenAPI.
Model-facing Effect v4 execute helpers and `GatewayContext` types.
Effect-shaped Turso client and migration helpers used by runtime storage.
Deterministic OpenAPI artifact generator/checker.
Updates marked project-structure blocks in .agent/AGENTS.md and README.md.
Local smoke probes for HTTP health, MCP HTTP execute, MCP stdio execute, and Agent Vault live checks.
Git submodule that generates repo-local skills from //<skill-gen> fragments.
Git submodule that generates GitHub Actions workflows from marked YAML fragments.
Systemd unit and env templates for service operation.
Deployment, Agent Vault, and operation notes for this repo.
Repo-local agent brain skills. Do not hand-edit generated SKILL.md files directly.
Project-local working, semantic, episodic, and preference memory.
Tool, permission, and delegation protocols shared across agent harnesses.
Project-local review and style rules.
Agent memory, recall, and skill support utilities.
